zh.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh.Arras, France: 法國迪瑟 達阿拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert VII seigneur de Béthune於大約1198年出生在法國時，他的父親Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel45歲，母親Matilda DE TENREMONDE29歲。他於大約1230年與Elisabeth de Morialmé結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年11月12日在義大利薩德尼亞享年51歲，埋葬在法國迪瑟 達阿拉斯。

zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh-hans.Arras, France: 法国迪瑟 達阿拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert VII seigneur de Béthune于大约1198年出生在法国时，他的父亲Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel45岁，母亲Matilda DE TENREMONDE29岁。他于大约1230年与Elisabeth de Morialmé结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1248年11月12日在意大利薩德尼亞享年51岁，埋葬在法国迪瑟 達阿拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Robert VII seigneur de Béthune was born about 1198, in France, his father, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, was 45 and his mother, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, was 29. He married Elisabeth de Morialmé about 1230. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 12 November 1248, in Sardinia, Italy, at the age of 51, and was buried in Diocese of Arras, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert VII seigneur de Béthune est né environ 1198, à France, son père, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth de Morialmé environ 1230. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1248, à Sardegna, Italie, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Diocèse d'Arras, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert VII seigneur de Béthune um 1198 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel 45 und seine Mutter Matilda DE TENREMONDE 29. Er hat um 1230 Elisabeth de Morialmé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. November 1248 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Sardinien, Italien und wurde in Diocèse d'Arras, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VII seigneur de Béthune è nato il circa 1198 nel Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth de Morialmé circa 1230. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1248, nel Sardegna, Italia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Diocèse d'Arras, Francia.

ja.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウン
ja.Arras, France: フランスディオクeゼ ド'アラス
ja.lifeSummary: Robert VII seigneur de Béthuneが約1198年にフランスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israelは45歳，母Matilda DE TENREMONDEは29歳であった。約1230年にElisabeth de Morialméと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年11月12日にイタリアサルデグナで51歳で死去し，フランスディオクeゼ ド'アラスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert VII seigneur de Béthune(이)가 대략 1198년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda DE TENREMONDE(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 Elisabeth de Morialmé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 11월 12일 이탈리아 사르데그나에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 디오ce스 드'아라스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VII seigneur de Béthune nasceu aproximadamente 1198, em França, seu pai, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth de Morialmé aproximadamente 1230. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1248, em Sardegna, Itália, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Diocèse d'Arras, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert VII seigneur de Béthune родился около 1198 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda DE TENREMONDE, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth de Morialmé около 1230 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 12 ноября 1248 г. в местности сардегна, Италия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности диокeс д'аррас, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert VII seigneur de Béthune nació aproximadamente 1198, en Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elisabeth de Morialmé aproximadamente 1230. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1248, en Sardegna, Italia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Diocèse d'Arras, Francia.
